The new release of the ULD selection and ordering algorithm features a load control compliance module built by following plane-specific Weight and Balance manuals, the input of SMEs and the incorporation of real aircraft data.
The algorithm recognizes frequently used ULD types in main and lower bays, such as PMC, AKE, and RKN.
